☢ Nuclear Force NYC Emergency Router
Yield:
How to use Nuclear Force
  1. Click Place Blast to mark where the bomb drops
  2. Enter your address or click the GPS button
  3. Hit Analyze to see your escape route
Try: Times Square, Wall Street, 10001
